announcements.title: ![</>](assets/code-brackets.svg) Agentic AI Hackathon - SF
announcements.body: 8-Hour Hackathon at **AWS Builder Loft, SF** on June 5, 2026. Join us for an electrifying hackathon bringing together developers and AI enthusiasts. Sponsored by RocketRide, XTrace, vnovate, butterbase, Juspay & Photon.

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) RocketRide Launch Party
announcements.body: Join us for the big **RocketRide Launch Party** on June 18, 2026 at **The Shack, San Francisco**. Come celebrate the launch with the team!

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) RocketRide × MiniMax
announcements.body: RocketRide and **MiniMax** are partnering to bring the **M3** open-weights model to every pipeline. It's live today as a node in our open-source inventory. Drop it in, benchmark it, and trace every step.

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) Harness Engineering, Live
announcements.body: At **SCALE Demo Day**, co-founder **Joe Maionchi** built a pipeline in under 30 seconds, offline, on a 64-thread C++ runtime. RocketRide is the open AI harness you own, because it's open source.

announcements.title: ![RocketRide](assets/rocketride.svg) RocketRide Cloud is Live
announcements.body: **RocketRide Cloud** and **AIDE**, the AI Development Environment, are live. Sign up to start building.

announcements.title: ![Discord](assets/discord.svg) Join our Discord
announcements.body: Connect with the RocketRide team and builders on **Discord**.

announcements.title: ![</>](assets/code-brackets.svg) HackwithBay 3.0 - SF
announcements.body: 8-hour hackathon on **Thoughtful Agents for Productivity** at **AWS Builder Loft, SF** on July 7, 2026. Sponsored by RocketRide.

announcements.title: ![</>](assets/code-brackets.svg) HackwithSeattle 2.0
announcements.body: 8-hour hackathon at the **AWS Skill Center, Seattle** on July 17, 2026. Hack, get mentorship, and demo your project to industry leaders.

announcements.title: ![Listen](assets/mic.svg) Podcast: The IDE as AI Command Center
announcements.body: **Joe Maionchi** on why your IDE is the new command center for building AI. Watch the episode.

announcements.title: ![Listen](assets/mic.svg) Podcast: AI Is Fast, Projects Are Slow
announcements.body: On the **MLOps Community** podcast: why AI projects stall in production and how RocketRide closes the gap. Watch now.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Demo: Compare LLMs Side by Side
announcements.body: Watch **Josh** benchmark multiple LLMs in a single RocketRide pipeline, in real time. See the demo.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Community Demo: FitCheck
announcements.body: See **FitCheck**, a community-built app running on RocketRide, in action. Watch the demo.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Community Demo: PathFinder
announcements.body: **PathFinder**, a community-built RocketRide × **Neo4j** app, maps your skills from your current role to an AI-native target with a realistic timeline. Watch the demo.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Demo: Real-Time LLM Benchmarking
announcements.body: Route one prompt to **Claude, GPT-5.2, Gemini 3 Pro, and Grok** side by side in a real-time RocketRide eval pipeline. Watch the demo.

announcements.title: ![Watch](assets/video.svg) Demo: Meeting Recap That Writes Itself
announcements.body: A no-code RocketRide agent turns a meeting transcript into an executive summary and follow-up email in under 3 minutes. Watch the demo.
